entry.message: [info] Activation of plug-in DQC Rules Validator successful, version Check version using Tools->DQC->Version on the GUI or --dqc-version on the command line. - validate/DQC
[info] Activation of plug-in SEC Inline Transforms successful, version 19.2. - EDGAR/transform
[info] Activation of plug-in Inline XBRL Document Set successful, version 1.1. - inlineXbrlDocumentSet

[DQC.US.0091.9376] The element us-gaap:EquityMethodInvestmentOwnershipPercentage with a value of 100 has a value greater than a 1,000 percent. Percentage items should have a value that are generally between 0 and 1. In XBRL a value of 1 is equal to 100%. Please review the value of the element to ensure that it is scaled correctly. For example 200 basis points should be reported as 0.02.
Period :2025-12-31 Dimensions : srt:ScheduleOfEquityMethodInvestmentEquityMethodInvesteeNameAxis=fil:TungraySingaporePteLtdMember Unit : pure Decimals: inf
Rule Element Id:9376 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - trsg-20251231_20f.htm 3220
